hard_stops.logic: property information is required before vendor management can proceed
one or more active vendors have expired insurance — work must stop until coverage is reinstated
one or more active vendors have expired licenses — cannot perform work without valid licensure

soft_flags.logic: vendor contracts are due for renewal within 60 days — begin renegotiation or rebid
one or more vendors have performance ratings below acceptable threshold
vendor spend in one or more categories exceeds budget — review for cost control
unbid contracts exceed the competitive bidding threshold — procurement policy requires bids
